name: Educated
description: Knowledge was your birthright, libraries your playground. You've been groomed since childhood to understand the subtle arts of governance, diplomacy, and refined learning. The world is a chessboard, and you've been trained to play several moves ahead.

feats.name: Cultural Interests
feats.description: You gain an two additional languages, one to speak and one to read, relevant to your world. In addition, you have **Resolve** when making **Skill Checks** related to **Social** or **Lore**.
